entries.name: filesystem
entries.description: Browse, read, and write local files. Official MCP reference server.
entries.description_zh: 浏览、读取和写入本地文件。MCP 官方参考服务器。

entries.name: github
entries.description: Read/write GitHub issues, PRs, files. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN.
entries.description_zh: 读写 GitHub 的 issue、PR 和文件。需要 GITHUB_TOKEN。

entries.name: postgres
entries.description: Query Postgres databases by URI. Read-only by default.
entries.description_zh: 通过 URI 查询 Postgres 数据库。默认只读。

entries.name: sqlite
entries.description: Query and modify SQLite databases. Includes schema introspection. Python.
entries.description_zh: 查询和修改 SQLite 数据库,含表结构自省。Python 实现。

entries.name: obsidian
entries.description: Browse, search, create, edit, and tag notes in an Obsidian vault. Community server (StevenStavrakis/obsidian-mcp, ~710 stars, MIT). Read AND write capable — back up the vault (git or otherwise) before pointing this at it. Edit the second arg below to your vault's absolute path; the server takes the vault path as a positional CLI argument, not an env var. xiaoguai's first-party write-safe Obsidian connector is on the v1.1+ roadmap; until then, use this and rely on backups.
entries.description_zh: 在 Obsidian 仓库中浏览、搜索、创建、编辑和打标签。社区服务器(StevenStavrakis/obsidian-mcp,约 710 星,MIT)。可读可写——指向仓库前请先备份。把下方第二个参数改成你仓库的绝对路径;该服务器以位置参数(而非环境变量)接收仓库路径。xiaoguai 自带的写安全 Obsidian 连接器在 v1.1+ 路线图上,在此之前请用本服务器并依赖备份。

entries.name: slack
entries.description: Read channels and send messages. Requires Slack bot token.
entries.description_zh: 读取频道并发送消息。需要 Slack bot token。

entries.name: fetch
entries.description: Fetch web pages and return the cleaned content. Official MCP reference server (Python).
entries.description_zh: 抓取网页并返回清理后的内容。MCP 官方参考服务器(Python)。

entries.name: memory
entries.description: Lightweight knowledge graph in-memory store. Useful for prototyping persistent agent memory.
entries.description_zh: 轻量级内存知识图谱存储,适合为持久化 agent 记忆做原型。
